sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ السِّياحَةُ المُسْتَدامَةُ في العَصْرِ الرّاهِنِ ضَرورَةً مُلِحَّةً لِحِمايَةِ المَوارِدِ الطَّبيعيَّةِ لِلأَجْيالِ القادِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Održivi turizam se u današnje vrijeme smatra hitnom potrebom za zaštitu prirodnih resursa za buduće generacije.
sentences.translationEn: Sustainable tourism is considered an urgent necessity in the current era to protect natural resources for future generations.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ تَعُدْ هَذِهِ المُمَارَسَاتُ مُجَرَّدَ خِيارٍ تَرَفِيٍّ، بَلْ أَصْبَحَتْ واجِباً أَخْلاقِيّاً تَتَبَنَّاهُ الدُّوَلُ المَدَنِيَّةُ.
sentences.translation: Ove prakse više nisu samo luksuzan izbor, već su postale moralna obaveza koju usvajaju civilizovane države.
sentences.translationEn: These practices are no longer a mere luxury choice but have become a moral duty adopted by civilized nations.

sentences.arabic: لَوْ نَظَرْنَا إِلى التَّأثيراتِ السَّلْبِيَّةِ لِلسِّياحَةِ الجَماعيَّةِ، لَوَجَدْنَا أَنَّ التَّدَفُّقَ غَيْرَ المَدْروسِ يُؤَدِّي إِلى تَهالُكِ البِنْيَةِ التَّحْتِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ako bismo pogledali negativne efekte masovnog turizma, otkrili bismo da nekontrolisani priliv posjetitelja dovodi do propadanja infrastrukture.
sentences.translationEn: If we were to look at the negative effects of mass tourism, we would find that unstudied influxes lead to the deterioration of infrastructure.

sentences.arabic: كَما أَنَّ الازْدِحامَ الشَّديدَ يُسْهِمُ في تَشْوِيهِ المَعالِمِ الأَثَرِيَّةِ الَّتي صَمَدَتْ لِقُرونٍ طَويلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Također, velika prenaseljenost doprinosi narušavanju arheoloških spomenika koji su opstali vijekovima.
sentences.translationEn: Furthermore, severe overcrowding contributes to the defacement of archaeological landmarks that have withstood centuries.

sentences.arabic: لِذلِكَ، يَتَوجَّبُ على الحُكوماتِ سَنُّ تَشْريعاتٍ صارِمَةٍ تَنْظِمُ أَعْدادَ الزُّوّارِ في المَواقِعِ الحَسَّاسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga su vlade dužne donijeti stroge zakone koji regulišu broj posjetitelja na osjetljivim lokacijama.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, governments must enact strict legislation to regulate visitor numbers at sensitive sites.

sentences.arabic: ويَنْبَغي أَيْضاً تَشْجيعُ اسْتِخْدامِ الطّاقَةِ النَّظيفَةِ في كافَّةِ المَنشآتِ الفُنْدُقِيَّةِ الحَديثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Također treba poticati korištenje čiste energije u svim modernim hotelskim objektima.
sentences.translationEn: The use of clean energy in all modern hotel facilities should also be encouraged.

sentences.arabic: عِلاوَةً على ذلِكَ، فَإِنَّ تَعْزيزَ الوَعْيِ لَدى المُسافِرينَ يُساهِمُ في دَعْمِ الاِقْتِصاداتِ المَحَلِّيَّةِ الصَّغيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Osim toga, jačanje svijesti kod putnika doprinosi podršci malim lokalnim ekonomijama.
sentences.translationEn: Moreover, enhancing awareness among travelers contributes to supporting small local economies.

sentences.arabic: هَذا التَّوجُّهُ يَضْمَنُ تَوْزيعاً عادِلاً لِلثَّرْوَةِ بَعيداً عَنِ احْتِكارِ الشَّرِكاتِ العالَمِيَّةِ الكُبْرى.
sentences.translation: Ovaj trend osigurava pravednu raspodjelu bogatstva, daleko od monopola velikih globalnih kompanija.
sentences.translationEn: This approach ensures a fair distribution of wealth away from the monopoly of major international corporations.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الحِفاظَ على الهُوِيَّةِ التُّراثِيَّةِ لِلْمُدُنِ القَديمَةِ لا يَتَعارَضُ مُطْلَقاً مَعَ مَفاهيمِ الحَداثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Očuvanje identiteta baštine starih gradova nimalo nije u suprotnosti s konceptima modernizacije.
sentences.translationEn: Preserving the heritage identity of ancient cities does not conflict at all with the concepts of modernity.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ يُمَكِّنُنا ذلِكَ مِن خَلْقِ تَجْرِبَةٍ سِياحِيَّةٍ فَريدَةٍ تَمْزُجُ بَيْنَ عَبَقِ الماضي وطُموحِ المُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, to nam omogućava stvaranje jedinstvenog turističkog iskustva koje spaja miris prošlosti s ambicijama budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, it enables us to create a unique tourist experience that blends the fragrance of the past with the ambitions of the future.

sentences.arabic: وفي الخِتامِ، يَبْقى التَّوازُنُ بَيْنَ الاِزْدِهارِ الاِقْتِصادِيِّ وحِمايَةِ البيئَةِ هوَ التَّحَدِّي الأَبْرَزَ.
sentences.translation: U zaključku, ravnoteža između ekonomskog prosperiteta i zaštite okoliša ostaje najistaknutiji izazov.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, the balance between economic prosperity and environmental protection remains the most prominent challenge.

sentences.arabic: فَبِدونِ هَذا التَّوازُنِ، قدْ نَفْقِدُ الجَمالَ الَّذي نَسْعى لِاكْتِشافِهِ في رِحلاتِنا حَوْلَ العالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Bez ove ravnoteže, mogli bismo izgubiti ljepotu koju nastojimo otkriti na našim putovanjima širom svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: Without this balance, we may lose the beauty we seek to discover in our travels around the world.
